# Sessions API Result Codes

**API Collection**

Recognize result codes specific to the sessions API.

## Discussion

Use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCopyErrorMessageString(_:_:)] function to obtain a human readable string corresponding to these status codes.

The functions of the sessions API may also return result codes from the authorization services API listed in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/authorization-services-result-codes] or the general codes listed in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes].

## Codes

- **errSessionSuccess**: The operation completed successfully.
- **errSessionInvalidId**: Detected an invalid session ID.
- **errSessionInvalidAttributes**: Detected an invalid set of request attribute bits.
- **errSessionAuthorizationDenied**: Authorization denied.
- **errSessionValueNotSet**: The requested session attribute has not been set.
- **errSessionInternal**: An unrecognized internal error occurred.
- **errSessionInvalidFlags**: Encountered invalid flags or options.
